content.en:
"Six thousand extradimensional rules!"

Ye Tian's copy body in the depths of the Silver Mountain Vein was still cultivating here, but the progress of the Extradimensional Rule Realm was extremely slow, and there was no bonus effect on him here.

He knew it was time for him to leave.

So on this day, he came out directly from the depths of the veins of the silver mountain.

The White Armor Realm Lord of the Silver Mountain and many other Fourth Realm masters sensed that Ye Tian had come out, and they were dumbfounded one by one.

"How is this possible, how many long years have passed, how can he still be alive?"

Bai Kai thought it was incredible.

But he didn't dare to speak, after all, Ye Tian's strength far surpassed him, how could he dare to question Ye Tian!

It wasn't until Ye Tian left that they discussed.

"Could it be that the depths of the Silver Mountain don't have that weird corrosive power?"

A Fourth Realm skeptical asked.

"Why don't you take a look?"

Another Fourth Realm proposed.

Immediately, several Fourth Realms were ready to go over and take a look.

However, they soon came out.

"That weird power is still there. "

At this time, they were even more curious about how Ye Tian had survived until now, but they didn't dare to explore, otherwise it would easily lead to disaster.

......

"Six thousand extra-dimensional rules, it is estimated that it will be difficult to continue to raise 413 extradimensional rules in the future!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, he also heard one thing, that is, during the multi-dimensional tribulation, it is easier to comprehend the extradimensional rules, and during the multi-dimensional tribulation, it is easier to improve the extradimensional rules.

Many of the fourth realm's super-dimensional rule realms are rapidly ascended during the multi-dimensional tribulation or multi-dimensional tribulation, and it is extremely difficult to improve in ordinary times, and it is even difficult to advance an inch.

However, now that there were hundreds of millions of extradimensional epochs left before the next multidimensional tribulation began, he couldn't wait until then.

At this time, he remembered the Lord of the Extinction Realm.

The Extinction Realm Lord did not survive a multi-dimensional tribulation time, in fact, the cultivation years were only billions of extradimensional eras, but the super-dimensional rule realm was not low, and it was a casual cultivation, and it was not cultivated by any forces.

Perhaps, the Lord of the Extinction Realm knows some treasures that can assist in the comprehension of extradimensional rules.

"Maybe you can make a deal with the Lord of the Extinction Realm!"

Ye Tian secretly decided.

So, on this day, Ye Tian contacted the Extinction Realm Lord and only mentioned the third layer of the Three Black Secret Method.

Soon after, the Lord of the Extinction arrived.

At this time, Ye Tian found that the aura of the Extinction Realm Lord was even stronger, and he definitely possessed the combat power of the fifth day pass, but it was only the combat power of the fifth day pass.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, have you obtained the third layer of the Three Black Secret Method?"

The Lord of the Extinction Realm took a deep breath.

He was very aware of the value of the third layer of the Three Black Secret Method, except for the overlord-level extradimensional forces, any top big force wanted to snatch it!

"That's good!" Ye Tian nodded, "I want to know if your extradimensional rules are slowly comprehended through a long period of time, or with the help of some treasures or treasures. "

The Extinction Realm Lord thought for a moment, he finally knew what Ye Tian's purpose was, he wanted to use the inheritance of the third layer of the Three Black Secret Method in exchange for the opportunity to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

So, he spoke: "Ye Tian Realm Lord, I have indeed entered a certain treasure land to comprehend the superdimensional rules, so that I can raise the superdimensional rules to the realm of more than 10,000 realms, if you trade the third layer of the Sanwu Secret Method to me, I will tell you the location of that treasure land." "

"No problem!"

Ye Tian agreed, and they made an oath.

Subsequently, Ye Tian gave the third layer of the Three Black Secret Method to the Extinction Realm Lord, and the Extinction Realm Lord also gave Ye Tian an address and related information.

"This place is the place where a multi-dimensional life has fallen!" said the Lord of the Extinction Realm, "Multidimensional life is a special life, an existence beyond a super-dimensional life, and it is extremely rare, I have only seen such a fallen multi-dimensional life. And according to my calculations, this multi-dimensional life should be a multi-dimensional life in the sixth realm. "

"The Fallen Sixth Realm Multidimensional Life !!"

Ye Tian was very surprised that such an important place was discovered by the Extinction Realm Lord.

If such a place is traded, the Extinction Realm Lord can definitely obtain a large amount of resources from the overlord-level extradimensional forces, but he may also be wiped out by the overlord-level extradimensional forces.

That's why he didn't dare to say it.

"Assimilation?"

Ye Tian frowned slightly, "What does this mean?"

The Extinction Realm Lord explained: "When I contemplated the enlightenment before, after a long period of contemplation, my body would be affected by the breath of multi-dimensional life, even the will of the soul would be affected, and the bloodlines on my body would gradually be transformed. As far as I know, there are dozens of assimilated extradimensional beings there, all of whom have been assimilated, and apparently they have not resisted the temptation. Of course, they won't attack you, they will only guard in front of the corpse of the sixth realm multi-dimensional life, and silent contemplation will not be affected, but if you get closer, you will definitely be attacked. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Immediately, he took his leave and went to the place where the Extinction Realm Lord had spoken, while the Extinction Realm Lord went back to retreat and cultivate the third-level inheritance of the Three Black Secret Method.

......

After a while, Ye Tian came to the territory of four thousand seven hundred and ninety-nine, and the place that the Extinction Realm Lord said was here.

Soon.

He came to a seemingly ordinary area of the Void of Death, where he broke through the third dimension and escaped into it.

In an area of the third dimension, a large debris floats there.

After Ye Tian entered, he really saw an unimaginably large multi-dimensional life corpse.

The volume of this multi-dimensional life corpse is about equivalent to ten extradimensional realms, and there are dozens of extradimensional creatures at the peak of the fourth realm entrenched around it, their breath is exactly the same as the breath of this sixth realm multi-dimensional life, and they don't seem to have any wisdom, and they have been staying there motionless.

"This is assimilation, it's really scary!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he found a suitable position to comprehend the scales on the body of the sixth realm multi-dimensional life, but he also reminded himself all the time that he must not be assimilated.

He was worried that the power of the sixth realm's multi-dimensional life would infiltrate and affect other replica bodies, and that would be the end of it.

Airplanes!

A mysterious force came under influence, trying to spread to other replicant bodies of themselves.

At this time.

Ye Tian urged the Great Realm Armor Technique with all his might, which blocked the power from the Sixth Realm.

"Sure enough, the clone is useless, even if it is a copy of the body, it cannot avoid being eroded, fortunately, I have cultivated the Great Realm Armor Technique to the fifth layer of the highest realm, which can block the deduction and tracking of the power of the sixth realm, otherwise, I will not be able to comprehend for too long, otherwise the whole body will be assimilated!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
